title: Iliad, Book 13: The Battle at the Ships
description: Book 13 of Homer's Iliad: The Battle at the Ships.
introduction: Book 13 of the Iliad: The Battle at the Ships. The Greek text is from the Venetus A manuscript (10th century), the oldest complete manuscript of the Iliad.

translation.original_text: Ζεὺς δ᾿ ἐπεὶ οὖν Τρῶάς τε καὶ Ἕκτορα νηυσὶ πέλασσεν.
translation.text: Zeus turned his eyes away, and Poseidon came to the aid of the Greeks, rallying them in the form of Calchas. The battle surged back and forth among the ships. Ajax stood like a tower.
